title: salix × refraga
intro: Salix × refraga, also known as the 'Fragrant Willow', is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Salix purpurea and Salix fragilis. The leaves of the Salix × refraga plant have been used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The herbal preparations of Salix × refraga, such as willow bark tea and tincture, have been found to provide relief from pain, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, while also offering potential health benefits like improved cardiovascular health and antioxidant properties. In herbal medicine, Salix × refraga is often used to treat various conditions, including arthritis, migraines, and menstrual cramps, although it's essential to consult a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
